nice_to_have: If a worldbuilding cluster post (A6) ships, add a post_link at the worldbuilding section.

metadata.title: 50+ Copy-Paste AI Story Prompts for Fiction Writers
metadata.description: 52 reusable, copy-paste AI story prompts for fiction writers, organized by stage: idea, plot, character, worldbuilding, scene, dialogue, and revision.
